title: trichophyllum engelmannii
intro: Trichophyllum engelmannii, also known as Engelmann's moss, is a type of pleurocarpous moss belonging to the family Hypnaceae. It is a non-vascular, terrestrial plant that grows in dense patches, typically found in shaded, humid environments. The medicinal properties of Trichophyllum engelmannii include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is said to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and promoting wound healing.
